detectors.description:
Kattana.burnTokenCheck(address,address,uint256) (Kattana.sol#1483-1511) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- _safeOwner = recipient (Kattana.sol#1485)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		Kattana.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		Kattana.transfer(address,uint256)
		Kattana._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)

		Kattana.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		Kattana.transfer(address,uint256)
		Kattana._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)
